output: {"match_id":"m017","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant re-invocation after fresh authoritative tool output. A is richer and more discriminating: multi-part follow-up, tempting verification language, costly AWS listing, and risks of redundant escalation/sorting. Pilot signal supports relevance (2.8 on target). B is clear but simpler, with no pilot means and an arguably explicit TTL making the correct behavior too easy."}
